Distributed Ledger Technology Partner

We deliver enterprise grade, permissioned based blockchain infrastructure and software.

> private nodes, peers and certificate authorities
> bypass configuration and infrastructure headaches
> from software concept to deployment lifecycle
> scalable cluster management and monitoring

Learn More

Specialists in bespoke permission based distributed ledger projects

Have an idea for a new DLT project? We work with SMEs, Enterprise and Funded Startups on complex, private blockchain projects.

Encryption

Digital asset encryption creating a zero-knowledge encrypted file. Assets can only be decrypted by users who have been granted access.

Cryptography

A one-way cryptograpic hash assertion mechanism to ensure tamper proof assets.

Decentralised Blockchain

Distributed storage on a permissions based blockchain removes the central authority point of failure, storing an immutable transaction chain of your assets.

Proof of Revision

Full asset audit trail and version history. Compare previous versions, attribute changes, view stats.

Encryptometrics
